channel.title: Drupal.org — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Drupal.org (drupal).

item.title: CVE-2026-11913 — Mother May I - Critical - Unsupported - SA-CONTRIB-2026-045
item.description: vulnerability in Drupal Mother May I allows . This issue affects Mother May I versions: *.*.

item.title: CVE-2026-11914 — Composer - Critical - Unsupported - SA-CONTRIB-2026-046
item.description: vulnerability in Drupal Composer allows . This issue affects Composer versions: *.*.

item.title: CVE-2026-11915 — Brute force attack protection - Critical - Unsupported - SA-CONTRIB-2026-047
item.description: vulnerability in Drupal Brute force attack protection allows . This issue affects Brute force attack protection versions: *.*.

item.title: CVE-2026-15087 — Clean RESTful - Critical - Unsupported - SA-CONTRIB-2026-078
item.description: vulnerability in Drupal Clean RESTful allows . This issue affects Clean RESTful versions: *.*.

item.title: CVE-2026-15086 — Raw Formatter [Meta Tag Formatter] - Critical - Unsupported - SA-CONTRIB-2026-077
item.description: vulnerability in Drupal Raw Formatter [Meta Tag Formatter] allows . This issue affects Raw Formatter [Meta Tag Formatter] versions: *.*.

item.title: CVE-2026-15089 — Commerce guest registration - Critical - Unsupported - SA-CONTRIB-2026-079
item.description: vulnerability in Drupal Commerce guest registration allows . This issue affects Commerce guest registration versions: *.*.

item.title: CVE-2026-55808 — Drupal core - Moderately critical - Improper validation - SA-CORE-2026-009
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ("Cross-site Scripting") vulnerability in Drupal Drupal core allows Cross-Site Scripting (XSS). This issue affects Drupal core versions: from 0.0.0 to 10.5.12, from 10.6.0 to 10.6.11, from 1…

item.title: CVE-2026-55807 — Drupal core - Moderately critical - Server-side request forgery - SA-CORE-2026-008
item.description: Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) vulnerability in Drupal Drupal core allows Server Side Request Forgery. This issue affects Drupal core versions: from 0.0.0 to 10.5.12, from 10.6.0 to 10.6.11, from 11.2.0 to 11.2.14, from 11.3.0 to 11.3.12, from 0.…

item.title: CVE-2026-55806 — Drupal core - Less critical - Cache poisoning and open redirect - SA-CORE-2026-007
item.description: URL Redirection to Untrusted Site ('Open Redirect') vulnerability in Drupal Drupal core allows Content Spoofing. This issue affects Drupal core versions: from 0.0.0 to 10.5.12, from 10.6.0 to 10.6.11, from 11.2.0 to 11.2.14, from 11.3.0 to 11.3.12, f…

item.title: CVE-2026-55804 — Drupal core - Moderately critical - Gadget chain - SA-CORE-2026-006
item.description: Improperly Controlled Modification of Dynamically-Determined Object Attributes vulnerability in Drupal Drupal core allows Object Injection. This issue affects Drupal core versions: from 0.0.0 to 10.5.12, from 10.6.0 to 10.6.11, from 11.2.0 to 11.2.14…

item.title: CVE-2026-55803 — Drupal core - Critical - PHP object injection - SA-CORE-2026-005
item.description: Improperly Controlled Modification of Dynamically-Determined Object Attributes vulnerability in Drupal Drupal core allows Object Injection. This issue affects Drupal core versions: from 0.0.0 to 10.5.12, from 10.6.0 to 10.6.11, from 11.2.0 to 11.2.14…

item.title: CVE-2026-15085 — AI SEO/GEO Analyzer - Moderately critical - Cross-site Scripting - SA-CONTRIB-2026-076
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ("Cross-site Scripting") vulnerability in Drupal AI SEO/GEO Analyzer allows Stored XSS. This issue affects AI SEO/GEO Analyzer versions: from 0.0.0 to 1.1.3.

item.title: CVE-2026-15084 — UI Patterns (SDC in Drupal UI) - Moderately critical - Cross site scripting - SA-CONTRIB-2026-075
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ("Cross-site Scripting") vulnerability in Drupal UI Patterns (SDC in Drupal UI) allows Stored XSS. This issue affects UI Patterns (SDC in Drupal UI) versions: from 2.0.0 to 2.0.17.

item.title: CVE-2026-15083 — ECA: Event - Condition - Action - Less critical - Information disclosure - SA-CONTRIB-2026-074
item.description: Improperly Controlled Modification of Dynamically-Determined Object Attributes vulnerability in Drupal ECA: Event - Condition - Action allows Object Injection. This issue affects ECA: Event - Condition - Action versions: from 0.0.0 to 2.1.20, from 3.…

item.title: CVE-2026-15082 — Siteimprove Analytics - Moderately critical - Cross-site Scripting - SA-CONTRIB-2026-073
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ("Cross-site Scripting") vulnerability in Drupal Siteimprove Analytics allows Cross-Site Scripting (XSS). This issue affects Siteimprove Analytics versions: from 0.0.0 to 2.0.1.

item.title: CVE-2026-15081 — Location Selector - Critical - SQL Injection - SA-CONTRIB-2026-072
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Command ('SQL Injection') vulnerability in Drupal Location Selector allows SQL Injection. This issue affects Location Selector versions: from 0.0.0 to 1.3.0.

item.title: CVE-2026-15080 — Ray Enterprise Translation - Moderately critical - Cross site request forgery - SA-CONTRIB-2026-071
item.description: Cross-Site Request Forgery (CSRF) vulnerability in Drupal Ray Enterprise Translation allows Cross Site Request Forgery. This issue affects Ray Enterprise Translation versions: from 0.0.0 to 4.0.4, from 4.1.0 to 4.1.4, from 11.0.0 to 11.0.4.

item.title: CVE-2026-15079 — Login Disable - Moderately critical - Access bypass - SA-CONTRIB-2026-070
item.description: Improper Restriction of Excessive Authentication Attempts vulnerability in Drupal Login Disable allows Brute Force. This issue affects Login Disable versions: from 0.0.0 to 2.1.4.

item.title: CVE-2026-58591 — Colorbox - Moderately critical - Cross-site scripting - SA-CONTRIB-2026-069
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ("Cross-site Scripting") vulnerability in Drupal Colorbox allows Cross-Site Scripting (XSS). This issue affects Colorbox versions: from 0.0.0 to 2.1.5, from 0.0.0 to 2.2.0.

item.title: CVE-2026-58590 — FlowDrop - Moderately critical - Access bypass - SA-CONTRIB-2026-068
item.description: Missing Authorization vulnerability in Drupal FlowDrop allows Forceful Browsing. This issue affects FlowDrop versions: from 0.0.0 to 1.6.0.

item.title: CVE-2026-58589 — FlowDrop - Moderately critical - Access bypass - SA-CONTRIB-2026-067
item.description: Missing Authorization vulnerability in Drupal FlowDrop allows Forceful Browsing. This issue affects FlowDrop versions: from 0.0.0 to 1.6.0.

item.title: CVE-2026-58588 — Drupal Canvas - Moderately critical - Improper validation - SA-CONTRIB-2026-066
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ("Cross-site Scripting") vulnerability in Drupal Drupal Canvas allows Cross-Site Scripting (XSS). This issue affects Drupal Canvas versions: from 0.0.0 to 1.4.2, from 1.5.0 to 1.5.2, from 1.…

item.title: CVE-2026-58587 — Drupal Canvas - Moderately critical - Improper validation - SA-CONTRIB-2026-065
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ("Cross-site Scripting") vulnerability in Drupal Drupal Canvas allows Cross-Site Scripting (XSS). This issue affects Drupal Canvas versions: from 0.0.0 to 1.4.2, from 1.5.0 to 1.5.2, from 1.…

item.title: CVE-2026-13244 — Tealium iQ Tag Management - Critical - PHP object injection - SA-CONTRIB-2026-064
item.description: Improperly Controlled Modification of Dynamically-Determined Object Attributes vulnerability in Drupal Tealium iQ Tag Management allows Object Injection. This issue affects Tealium iQ Tag Management versions: from 0.0.0 to 2.4.0.

item.title: CVE-2026-13243 — Salesforce Suite - Moderately critical - Cross-site request forgery - SA-CONTRIB-2026-063
item.description: Cross-Site Request Forgery (CSRF) vulnerability in Drupal Salesforce Suite allows Cross Site Request Forgery. This issue affects Salesforce Suite versions: from 0.0.0 to 5.1.3.

item.title: CVE-2026-13242 — Geolocation Field - Critical - SQL Injection - SA-CONTRIB-2026-062
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Command ('SQL Injection') vulnerability in Drupal Geolocation Field allows SQL Injection. This issue affects Geolocation Field versions: from 0.0.0 to 3.15.0.

item.title: CVE-2026-13241 — Paragraphs - Moderately critical - Access bypass - SA-CONTRIB-2026-061
item.description: Missing Authorization vulnerability in Drupal Paragraphs allows Forceful Browsing. This issue affects Paragraphs versions: from 0.0.0 to 1.21.0.

item.title: CVE-2026-13240 — Paragraphs - Less critical - Access bypass - SA-CONTRIB-2026-060
item.description: Missing Authorization vulnerability in Drupal Paragraphs allows Forceful Browsing. This issue affects Paragraphs versions: from 0.0.0 to 1.21.0.

item.title: CVE-2026-13239 — WissKI - Critical - Access bypass - SA-CONTRIB-2026-059
item.description: Missing Authorization vulnerability in Drupal WissKI allows Forceful Browsing. This issue affects WissKI versions: from 0.0.0 to 4.2.0.

item.title: CVE-2026-13238 — Commerce Realex / Global Payments - Moderately critical - Access Bypass - SA-CONTRIB-2026-058
item.description: Incorrect Authorization vulnerability in Drupal Commerce Realex / Global Payments allows Forceful Browsing. This issue affects Commerce Realex / Global Payments versions: from 0.0.0 to 3.0.2.

item.title: CVE-2026-13237 — AI Agents - Moderately critical - Information disclosure, Access bypass - SA-CONTRIB-2026-057
item.description: Incorrect Authorization vulnerability in Drupal AI Agents allows Forceful Browsing. This issue affects AI Agents versions: from 0.0.0 to 1.1.4, from 1.2.0 to 1.2.5, from 1.3.0 to 1.3.1.

item.title: CVE-2026-13236 — AI Agents - Less critical - Access bypass - SA-CONTRIB-2026-056
item.description: Missing Authorization vulnerability in Drupal AI Agents allows Forceful Browsing. This issue affects AI Agents versions: from 0.0.0 to 1.1.4, from 1.2.0 to 1.2.5, from 1.3.0 to 1.3.1.

item.title: CVE-2026-13235 — AI (Artificial Intelligence) - Moderately critical - Access bypass - SA-CONTRIB-2026-055
item.description: Missing Authorization vulnerability in Drupal AI (Artificial Intelligence) allows Forceful Browsing. This issue affects AI (Artificial Intelligence) versions: from 0.0.0 to 1.2.17, from 1.3.0 to 1.3.8, from 1.4.0 to 1.4.3.

item.title: CVE-2026-13234 — AI (Artificial Intelligence) - Moderately critical - Information Disclosure / Cross-site Scripting - SA-CONTRIB-2026-054
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ("Cross-site Scripting") vulnerability in Drupal AI (Artificial Intelligence) allows Cross-Site Scripting (XSS). This issue affects AI (Artificial Intelligence) versions: from 0.0.0 to 1.2.1…

item.title: CVE-2026-13233 — OpenAI Provider - Moderately critical - Server-side Request Forgery - SA-CONTRIB-2026-053
item.description: Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) vulnerability in Drupal OpenAI Provider allows Server Side Request Forgery. This issue affects OpenAI Provider versions: from 0.0.0 to 1.1.1, from 1.2.0 to 1.2.2.

item.title: CVE-2026-13232 — Advanced Content Feedback (aka admin_feedback) - Moderately critical - Access bypass / Insecure Direct Object Reference (IDOR) - SA-CONTRIB-2026-052
item.description: Incorrect Authorization vulnerability in Drupal Advanced Content Feedback (aka admin_feedback) allows Forceful Browsing. This issue affects Advanced Content Feedback (aka admin_feedback) versions: from 0.0.0 to 2.8.0.

item.title: CVE-2026-13231 — Advanced Content Feedback (aka admin_feedback) - Moderately critical - Cross-site scripting - SA-CONTRIB-2026-051
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ("Cross-site Scripting") vulnerability in Drupal Advanced Content Feedback (aka admin_feedback) allows Stored XSS. This issue affects Advanced Content Feedback (aka admin_feedback) versions:…

item.title: CVE-2026-55810 — Plotly.js Graphing - Critical - PHP object injection - SA-CONTRIB-2026-050
item.description: Improperly Controlled Modification of Dynamically-Determined Object Attributes vulnerability in Drupal Plotly.js Graphing allows Object Injection. This issue affects Plotly.js Graphing versions: from 0.0.0 to 3.0.2.

item.title: CVE-2026-55809 — Flag attendance field - Critical - PHP object injection - SA-CONTRIB-2026-049
item.description: Improperly Controlled Modification of Dynamically-Determined Object Attributes vulnerability in Drupal Flag attendance field allows Object Injection. This issue affects Flag attendance field versions: from 0.0.0 to 1.2.

item.title: CVE-2026-12535 — Formatter Field - Critical - PHP object injection - SA-CONTRIB-2026-048
item.description: Improperly Controlled Modification of Dynamically-Determined Object Attributes vulnerability in Drupal Formatter Field allows Object Injection. This issue affects Formatter Field versions: from 0.0.0 to 2.0.0.

item.title: CVE-2026-11909 — Examples for Developers - Moderately critical - Access bypass - SA-CONTRIB-2026-044
item.description: Missing Authorization vulnerability in Drupal Examples for Developers allows Forceful Browsing. This issue affects Examples for Developers versions: from 0.0.0 to 4.0.6.

item.title: CVE-2026-11908 — Tagify - Moderately critical - Cross-site scripting (XSS) - SA-CONTRIB-2026-043
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ("Cross-site Scripting") vulnerability in Drupal Tagify allows Stored XSS. This issue affects Tagify versions: from 0.0.0 to 1.2.52.

item.title: CVE-2026-10770 — Anti-Spam by CleanTalk - Moderately critical - Cross site scripting - SA-CONTRIB-2026-042
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ("Cross-site Scripting") vulnerability in Drupal Anti-Spam by CleanTalk allows Reflected XSS. This issue affects Anti-Spam by CleanTalk versions: from 0.0.0 to 9.7.1.

item.title: CVE-2026-10769 — Commerce Core - Moderately critical - Cross site scripting - SA-CONTRIB-2026-041
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ("Cross-site Scripting") vulnerability in Drupal Commerce Core allows Stored XSS. This issue affects Commerce Core versions: from 3.3.0 to 3.3.6.

item.title: CVE-2026-10768 — LocalGov Workflows - Moderately critical - Information disclosure - SA-CONTRIB-2026-039
item.description: Missing Authorization vulnerability in Drupal LocalGov Workflows allows Forceful Browsing. This issue affects LocalGov Workflows versions: from 0.0.0 to 1.6.0.

item.title: CVE-2026-9726 — Drupal AlternativeCommerce (Basket) - Highly critical - Arbitrary PHP code execution - SA-CONTRIB-2026-038
item.description: Improperly Controlled Modification of Dynamically-Determined Object Attributes vulnerability in Drupal Drupal AlternativeCommerce (Basket) allows Object Injection. This issue affects Drupal AlternativeCommerce (Basket) versions: from 0.0.0 to 2.1.17.

item.title: CVE-2026-6816 · 5.1 MEDIUM — TFA Basic Plugins - Access Bypass
item.description: An access bypass vulnerability in Drupal TFA Basic Plugins allows users with the administer users permission to view or generate recovery codes for other users. This issue affects TFA Basic Plugins: from 7.x-1.0 through 7.x-1.2.

item.title: CVE-2026-5343 · 7.4 HIGH 🌩️ — SAML SSO - Service Provider - Critical - Authentication bypass - SA-CONTRIB-2026-031
item.description: Improper Check for Unusual or Exceptional Conditions vulnerability in Drupal SAML SSO - Service Provider allows Privilege Escalation. This issue affects SAML SSO - Service Provider: from 0.0.0 before 3.1.4.

item.title: CVE-2026-4093 · 5.1 MEDIUM — Stored XSS in Drupal 7 Term Reference Tree module (token display templates and term labels)
item.description: In the Drupal 7 Term Reference Tree module, two stored XSS vectors exist in the widget/formatter rendering pipeline. Vector A (token display templates): When the Token module is enabled and token display templates are configured, attacker-controlled…

item.title: CVE-2026-4929 · 5.1 MEDIUM — Simple Hierarchical Select (Drupal 7) XSS in term-derived output
item.description: Simple Hierarchical Select (SHS) for Drupal 7 contains cross-site scripting risk due to improper output escaping of term-derived text. Confirmed affected paths include field formatter output (shs_field_formatter_view) and term-tree child-term data ge…
